sso.permissionset.customermanagedpolicyr: Specifies the name and path of a customer managed policy. You must have an IAM policy that matches the name and path in each AWS account where you want to deploy your permission set.

sso.permissionset.customermanagedpolicyr.Description: The name of the IAM policy that you have configured in each account where you want to deploy your permission set.

The path to the IAM policy that you have configured in each account where you want to deploy your permission set. The default is `/`. For more information, see [Friendly names and paths](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/reference_identifiers.html#identifiers-friendly-names) in the *IAM User Guide*.
